item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair spiral and refuses the new transfer channel. Turn 2 also keeps the anti-spiral brake active and does not deliver the requested channel patch. However, its urgent fallback is only an immediate temporary upstream adjudication; it does not visibly carry the full bounded-emergency contract, especially a structural repair deadline, so it is partial rather than a full pass."}
